meta.title: Vehicle Forge — Battle Log
meta.description: Cumulative testing record from all combat proving grounds

proving_grounds.name: Combat Proving Ground I
proving_grounds.notes: First full-scale validation. 100 hand-crafted scenarios across all eras. Confirmed MMG bounces off Abrams, Hellfire devastates T-72, scorpion plinks off dreadnought.

proving_grounds.name: Combat Proving Ground II — The Revenge
proving_grounds.notes: 150 encounters targeting edge cases: cross-era mismatches, Heavy Armor stress tests, mirror matches, every pack vehicle eligible. The crater is visible from low Earth orbit.

proving_grounds.name: Deterministic Regression Suite
proving_grounds.notes: 12 deterministic combat assertions run on every push via GitHub Actions CI.

dispatches.text: Cursed Submarine torpedoed an M5A1 Stuart parked on the jetty. 96 damage. The turret landed in a farmer's field three hundred yards inland. The farmer has since emigrated.
A Gato-Class Submarine put a torpedo into James Bond's car. 89 damage. The ejection system technically functioned. The insurance assessor wrote 'total loss' and underlined it twice.

A Type VII U-Boat destroyed a void-capable Siege Platform from the far future. 84 damage. A magnetic detonator from 1943 negated three thousand years of technological advantage. The philosophy department has been consulted.

PT Boat torpedoed a Scout Walker. 81 damage. The Walker's stealth systems, so effective against orbital sensors, proved somewhat less useful against a torpedo travelling at forty knots directly toward its kneecap.

A Royal Flagship — three hundred crew, flying the colours of a king who conquered the clouds — opened fire on a Willys MB Jeep. 15 shots. 0 damage. The Jeep has Heavy Armor. Don't ask why. The sky-captain reportedly wept.
An Armoured River Barge emptied everything it had into a T-80 MBT. Five hits. Zero effect. The T-80's crew reportedly brewed tea.
A Eurofighter Typhoon killed an M1A1 Abrams through Heavy Armor. One pass. One kill. The pilot could see the column of black smoke from thirty miles out.
A T-34/76 put a 75mm round through a Dragon-Rider Platform. 45 damage. The dragon survived. The rider achieved considerable altitude.
Two Anti-Kaiju Tanks destroyed. Toxic blood contaminating downtown. Three-day evacuation. Seventeen unfavourable press articles.
One Dragon-Rider Platform shot down. The dragon was 'startled but unharmed.' It has refused to participate in further exercises.
A family of ducks relocated from Sector 7 after the first salvo. A formal letter of apology has been sent to the pond.
A Cursed Longship went down in the naval proving area, trailing ectoplasmic residue and medieval tar. Several crabs were temporarily inconvenienced.
Dreadnought opened fire on a Galleon with its Mega Mass Driver. 10d12+10. Average damage: 75. The Galleon's Toughness: 20. 153 wounds across 10 shots. There is no galleon.
War Chariot fired a scorpion bolt at a Dreadnought. Effective Toughness: 54. Average damage: 7. No effect. The dreadnought did not notice.
PT Boat — the bravest crew in the proving ground — launched torpedoes at a Dreadnought. 8d10 vs Toughness 56. 27 wounds. DESTROYED. Sometimes courage is enough.
M1A1 Abrams fired a 120mm round into a Siege Tower. AP 31 vs wooden construction. 42 wounds. The concept of 'overkill' was briefly discussed and then dismissed.
F-15 Eagle fired a Sparrow missile at a Cessna Skyhawk. 5d8 vs Toughness 10. 32 wounds. The paperwork alone will take longer than the engagement did.
Tiger II ambushed an M4 Sherman at the Bulge. 88mm vs Toughness 22. Every shot penetrated. 26 wounds. Historically accurate and deeply unfair.
Hover Tank Heavy Laser vs T-80 MBT. AP 30 cuts through Cold War armour like it isn't there. The future is unkind to the present.
Heavy Cruiser fired a Mega Laser at a Destroyer. 8d10, AP 40. 56 wounds. The Destroyer ceased to exist as a coherent structure.
Battlecruiser Super Mass Driver vs Heavy Cruiser. 6d12+6. The cruiser's 8,000 tons of armoured hull absorbed 30 wounds before structural failure. Capital ship combat is not subtle.
Sherman vs King Tiger — uphill battle. 75mm vs Toughness 26. The Sherman's crew knew the odds. They fired anyway. 12 wounds. DESTROYED. Exploding dice don't care about your armour rating.
Spitfire vs Japanese Zero. Machine guns only. The Zero's paper-thin armour (Toughness 12) couldn't take the sustained fire. 3 wounds. Destroyed. The Channel is wider than the Pacific.
AH-64 Apache fired a Hellfire at a Galleon. 5d10, AP 40, vs wooden hull. 36 wounds. Five hundred tons of Spanish treasure now resting on the seabed. The historians are furious.
MMG vs M1A1 Abrams. Average damage 10 vs effective Toughness 28. The machine gun rounds sparked off the reactive armour and achieved nothing. Working as intended.
120mm vs T-72. AP 31 reduces effective Toughness to 18. Average damage 28. The T-72 does not survive this equation. Working as intended.
Hellfire vs T-72. AP 40 makes armour irrelevant. Average damage 28 vs effective Toughness 18. The missile costs more than the tank. Both are now scrap.
Every weapon in every family increases monotonically. Light Laser < Medium Laser < Heavy Laser < Super Laser < Superheavy Laser < Mega Laser. 11 → 16 → 22 → 28 → 33 → 44. The maths holds.
All 19 SWADE Core weapons verified exact against pp.79-81. Damage, AP, RoF, Range. Not a single digit out of place.
53 pack files scanned. 483 vehicles. 777 weapon mounts. Zero broken references. Zero stale embedded data.
Four canonical backups verified every run: 127 weapons, 47 vehicles, 34 specials, 41 mods. All match source of truth.
Damage range spans 5 to 75 with no gaps greater than 10 in the progression. From javelin racks to the Mega Mass Driver, the scaling holds.
IP compliance scanner: 53 pack descriptions clean, all catalogue names clean. Zero issues. Original designs throughout.
Branch protection active on main. Sync & Audit required. Force push blocked. Deletion blocked. The governance system has teeth.
Local property values have declined 40%. The insurance company has changed its phone number. Three neighbouring farmers have switched to organic. They had no choice — the topsoil is gone.
The proving ground crater is visible from low Earth orbit. Satellite imagery has been classified.
Total scrap metal produced across all tests: 259,152 tons. Enough to build 4,180 M1A1 Abrams tanks. Or one very large paperweight.
Total financial damage: $12.74 billion. Roughly the GDP of Madagascar. The accountants have requested a transfer.
262 encounters. 4,220 attacks. 224 vehicles destroyed. 0 generals court-martialled. Investigations ongoing.
594 vehicles. 127 weapons. 7 eras. 16 audit checks. 12 regression tests. 15 sanity checks. All pass. The system works.
Noise complaints filed: 422. Windows broken within 5km: 1,406. Seagulls startled: several. Ducks relocated: 1 family.
